title: Robert Neustaedter
compiled_truth: Robert Neustaedter is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2001-12-03), Robert Neustaedter sent 34 and received 746 emails, totalling 780 interactions. Top correspondents: [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (22), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (20), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (18), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (9), [Mark Whitt](people/mark-whitt) (7).
